selections.name: Descending Mist
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from BM74 to BM58. Despite a poor last run, previous form at higher levels rates superior to this field. Top weight is offset by class edge.

selections.name: Giddy Gan's Joy
selections.reason: Consistent performer with recent placings. Rating of 57 is competitive here and should be in the finish.

selections.name: Bill Peyto
selections.reason: Coming off a solid 2nd at Mudgee. Veteran who knows how to run a race at this level.

selections.name: Felis
selections.reason: Runner-up over this track and distance last start. Drawn the rails and stays well.

danger_horse.name: Giddy Gan's Joy
danger_horse.reason: Consistent recent form makes her a reliable threat if the top pick fails to fire.

selections.name: Justo's Rocket
selections.reason: Strong 2nd last start at Dubbo with a high rating of 52. Looks ready to break maiden status here.

selections.name: Moke Lake
selections.reason: Consistent type with multiple placings. Drawn barrier 1 and maps to get a perfect run.

selections.name: Breukelen
selections.reason: First starter who won a recent trial at Scone. Market watch advised.

selections.name: Bravalatante
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed ability in previous prep with a placing. Can run well fresh.

danger_horse.name: Moke Lake
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and has the consistency to win if the top pick finds trouble.

selections.name: Excessor
selections.reason: Debuted with a solid rating of 61 in a Super Maiden. Drops to standard maiden here. Kris Lees/Aaron Bullock combination is elite.

selections.name: Our Miracle Girl
selections.reason: Resuming. Has shown glimpses of ability and draws well.

selections.name: Lobbyist
selections.reason: Resuming. Trial winner leading in. Could sprint well fresh.

selections.name: Tralee
selections.reason: Fair debut effort. Should strip fitter and improve from a better gate.

danger_horse.name: Our Miracle Girl
danger_horse.reason: Fresh horse from a good stable could challenge if the favorite is flat.

selections.name: Ole Miss
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start at this track. Rating of 59 is superior to this field. Looks the winner.

selections.name: Varius
selections.reason: Solid debut effort. Will appreciate the step up in trip and draws the inside.

selections.name: Power Cruise
selections.reason: Resuming. Has shown ability in trials and previous prep.

selections.name: Pinero
selections.reason: Improved effort to place last start. Maps well from barrier 2.

danger_horse.name: Varius
danger_horse.reason: Lightly raced improver from a top stable.

selections.name: Stern Dispute
selections.reason: Last start winner with a strong rating of 58. Progressive type who can handle the class rise.

selections.name: Meddlesome
selections.reason: Consistent mare with a rating of 57. Narrowly beaten last start. Wide gate is the only concern.

selections.name: Alarthill
selections.reason: Broke maiden impressively last start. Rating stacks up well here.

selections.name: Manaftermidnight
selections.reason: Another last start winner. Has speed and can be competitive.

danger_horse.name: Meddlesome
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent and rates highly, just needs luck from the draw.

selections.name: Instead
selections.reason: Racing in great form. Placed in a Class 5 last start which is strong form for this. Rates highest (68).

selections.name: Pensativa
selections.reason: Consistent mare. Runner-up in this grade last start. Maps well.

selections.name: Bolt Away Now
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start. Rating 62 puts him right in the mix.

selections.name: Cenotes
selections.reason: Class runner with a 67 rating. Wide gate makes it tougher but has the ability.

danger_horse.name: Pensativa
danger_horse.reason: Reliable mare who rarely runs a bad race.

selections.name: Equitable
selections.reason: Won maiden with authority last start. Rating of 53 is competitive in this BM58. Draws perfectly.

selections.name: Brighella
selections.reason: Consistent type coming off a 3rd placing. Always competitive in this grade.

selections.name: Master Gee
selections.reason: Top weight and wide draw, but has the class (Rating 58) to feature.

selections.name: Ardonaugh
selections.reason: Not far away last start. Can run a race at odds.

danger_horse.name: Brighella
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form makes him a safe inclusion for exotics.
